# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 1
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2
  SECURE_ANALYZERS_PREFIX: "registry.gitlab.com/security-products"

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - security
  - deploy
  - notify

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

.get_mr_info:
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ "$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE" == "merge_request_event" ]; then
        export MR_TITLE="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        export MR_DESCRIPTION="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        export MR_IID="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
        export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME"
        export MR_TARGET_BRANCH="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME"
      else
        export MR_TITLE=$(git log -1 --pretty=%s)
        export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(git log -1 --pretty=%b)
        export MR_IID="N/A"
        export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH"
        export MR_TARGET_BRANCH="$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
      fi
      echo "MR Title: $MR_TITLE"
      echo "MR IID: $MR_IID"

prepare:metadata:
  stage: prepare
  extends: .get_mr_info
  script:
    - |
      cat > build_metadata.env << EOF
      MR_TITLE=$MR_TITLE
      MR_DESCRIPTION<<EODESC
      $MR_DESCRIPTION
      EODESC
      MR_IID=$MR_IID
      MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH
      MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$MR_TARGET_BRANCH
      BUILD_VERSION=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      BUILD_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
      EOF
    - cat build_metadata.env
    - |
      cat > release_notes.md << EOF
      # Release Notes - Build ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      
      ## Merge Request Information
      - **Title**: $MR_TITLE
      - **MR IID**: !$MR_IID
      - **Source Branch**: $MR_SOURCE_BRANCH
      - **Target Branch**: $MR_TARGET_BRANCH
      - **Commit**: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
      - **Author**: ${GITLAB_USER_NAME}
      - **Date**: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
      
      ## Description
      $MR_DESCRIPTION
      
      ## Changes
      $(git log --oneline -10)
      EOF
    - cat release_notes.md
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build_metadata.env
    paths:
      - build_metadata.env
      - release_notes.md
    expire_in: 1 week

build:application:
  stage: build
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  script:
    - echo "Building application for MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')
      export IMAGE_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
      echo "IMAGE_TAG=$IMAGE_TAG" >> build.env
    - |
      cat > Dockerfile << 'EOF'
      FROM alpine:3.18
      RUN apk add --no-cache curl bash
      WORKDIR /app
      COPY . .
      CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Application running'"]
      EOF
    - docker build --build-arg MR_TITLE="$MR_TITLE" --build-arg BUILD_VERSION="${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" -t myapp:${IMAGE_TAG} .
    - echo "Built image with tag: ${IMAGE_TAG}"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    expire_in: 1 week

test:unit:
  stage: test
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
  image: alpine:3.18
  script:
    - echo "Running unit tests for: $MR_TITLE"
    - apk add --no-cache bash
    - |
      cat > test_results.txt << EOF
      Test Suite: Unit Tests
      MR: $MR_TITLE
      Status: PASSED
      Tests Run: 42
      Passed: 42
      Failed: 0
      EOF
    - cat test_results.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test_results.txt
    expire_in: 1 week

test:integration:
  stage: test
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
    - build:application
  image: alpine:3.18
  script:
    - echo "Running integration tests for: $MR_TITLE"
    - apk add --no-cache bash
    - |
      cat > integration_results.txt << EOF
      Test Suite: Integration Tests
      MR: $MR_TITLE
      Build Version: ${BUILD_VERSION}
      Status: PASSED
      Tests Run: 15
      Passed: 15
      Failed: 0
      EOF
    - cat integration_results.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - integration_results.txt
    expire_in: 1 week

security:sast:
  stage: security
  image: $SECURE_ANALYZERS_PREFIX/semgrep:latest
  variables:
    SAST_EXCLUDED_PATHS: "spec,test,tests,tmp"
    SEARCH_MAX_DEPTH: 20
  script:
    - echo "Running SAST analysis"
    - /analyzer run
  artifacts:
    reports:
      sast: gl-sast-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  allow_failure: true

security:dependency_scanning:
  stage: security
  image: $SECURE_ANALYZERS_PREFIX/gemnasium:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running dependency scanning"
    - /analyzer run
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dependency_scanning: gl-dependency-scanning-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  allow_failure: true

security:secret_detection:
  stage: security
  image: $SECURE_ANALYZERS_PREFIX/secrets:latest
  script:
    - echo "Scanning for secrets"
    - /analyzer run
  artifacts:
    reports:
      secret_detection: gl-secret-detection-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  allow_failure: true

security:container_scanning:
  stage: security
  image: $SECURE_ANALYZERS_PREFIX/container-scanning:latest
  needs:
    - build:application
  variables:
    CS_IMAGE: "myapp:${IMAGE_TAG}"
  script:
    - echo "Scanning container image"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      container_scanning: gl-container-scanning-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  allow_failure: true

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
    - build:application
    - test:unit
    - test:integration
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    deployment_tier: staging
  script:
    - |
      SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')
      DEPLOYMENT_TAG="staging-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
    - echo "Deploying to staging with tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    - echo "Feature being deployed: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      cat > deployment_info.json << EOF
      {
        "environment": "staging",
        "version": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
        "mr_title": "$MR_TITLE",
        "mr_iid": "$MR_IID",
        "deployment_tag": "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG",
        "deployed_by": "${GITLAB_USER_NAME}",
        "deployed_at": "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")",
        "commit": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
        "branch": "$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH"
      }
      EOF
    - cat deployment_info.json
    - echo "Deployment completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_info.json
    expire_in: 1 month
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - main

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
    - build:application
    - test:unit
    - test:integration
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
    deployment_tier: production
  script:
    - |
      SAFE_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')
      DEPLOYMENT_TAG="prod-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
    - echo "Deploying to production with tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    - echo "Feature being deployed: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      cat > deployment_info_prod.json << EOF
      {
        "environment": "production",
        "version": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
        "mr_title": "$MR_TITLE",
        "mr_iid": "$MR_IID",
        "deployment_tag": "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG",
        "deployed_by": "${GITLAB_USER_NAME}",
        "deployed_at": "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")",
        "commit": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
        "branch": "$MR_TARGET_BRANCH"
      }
      EOF
    - cat deployment_info_prod.json
    - |
      git config user.email "ci@example.com"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
      git tag -a "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" -m "Production deployment: $MR_TITLE"
      echo "Created git tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    - echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_info_prod.json
    expire_in: 1 year
  only:
    - main
  when: manual

notify:slack:
  stage: notify
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
    - build:application
  image: alpine:3.18
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - |
      if [ "$CI_JOB_STATUS" == "success" ]; then
        STATUS_COLOR="good"
        STATUS_TEXT="✅ SUCCESS"
      else
        STATUS_COLOR="danger"
        STATUS_TEXT="❌ FAILED"
      fi
    - |
      PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "attachments": [
          {
            "color": "$STATUS_COLOR",
            "title": "Pipeline $STATUS_TEXT",
            "fields": [
              {
                "title": "MR Title",
                "value": "$MR_TITLE",
                "short": false
              },
              {
                "title": "MR IID",
                "value": "!$MR_IID",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Branch",
                "value": "$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Commit",
                "value": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Author",
                "value": "${GITLAB_USER_NAME}",
                "short": true
              },
              {
                "title": "Pipeline",
                "value": "${CI_PIPELINE_URL}",
                "short": false
              }
            ],
            "footer": "GitLab CI",
            "ts": $(date +%s)
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
    - echo "$PAYLOAD"
    - |
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "$PAYLOAD" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not configured, skipping notification"
      fi
  when: always

notify:email:
  stage: notify
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
    - build:application
  image: alpine:3.18
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash
    - |
      cat > notification_email.html << EOF
      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html>
      <head>
        <style>
          body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }
          .header { background-color: #4CAF50; color: white; padding: 10px; }
          .content { padding: 20px; }
          .footer { background-color: #f1f1f1; padding: 10px; font-size: 12px; }
          table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; }
          td, th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: left; }
        </style>
      </head>
      <body>
        <div class="header">
          <h2>Build Notification - ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="content">
          <h3>Merge Request: $MR_TITLE</h3>
          <table>
            <tr><td><strong>MR IID</strong></td><td>!$MR_IID</td></tr>
            <tr><td><strong>Source Branch</strong></td><td>$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH</td></tr>
            <tr><td><strong>Target Branch</strong></td><td>$MR_TARGET_BRANCH</td></tr>
            <tr><td><strong>Commit</strong></td><td>${CI_COMMIT_SHA}</td></tr>
            <tr><td><strong>Author</strong></td><td>${GITLAB_USER_NAME}</td></tr>
            <tr><td><strong>Pipeline</strong></td><td><a href="${CI_PIPELINE_URL}">View Pipeline</a></td></tr>
          </table>
          <h4>Description:</h4>
          <pre>$MR_DESCRIPTION</pre>
        </div>
        <div class="footer">
          <p>This is an automated notification from GitLab CI/CD</p>
        </div>
      </body>
      </html>
      EOF
    - cat notification_email.html
    - echo "Email notification prepared"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - notification_email.html
    expire_in: 1 week
  when: always

generate:release_notes:
  stage: notify
  extends: .get_mr_info
  needs:
    - prepare:metadata
    - deploy:production
  image: alpine:3.18
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache git bash
    - |
      cat > CHANGELOG.md << EOF
      # Changelog
      
      ## [${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}] - $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%d")
      
      ### Feature Deployed
      **$MR_TITLE**
      
      ### Details
      - **Merge Request**: !$MR_IID
      - **Commit**: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
      - **Author**: ${GITLAB_USER_NAME}
      - **Deployment Date**: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
      
      ### Description
      $MR_DESCRIPTION
      
      ### Commits Included
      $(git log --oneline -10)
      
      ---
      EOF
    - cat CHANGELOG.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - CHANGELOG.md
    expire_in: 1 year
  only:
    - main
  when: on_success
